Falsehood: The Great Wall of China is visible from space.
Truth: The Great Wall of China is not visible from space.
Napoleon Bonaparte was of average height for his era.

Falsehood: We only use 10 percent of our brains.
Truth: We use virtually all of our brain.

Falsehood: Lightning never strikes the same place twice.
Truth: Lightning frequently strikes the same place twice.

Falsehood: Goldfish have a three second memory.
Truth: Goldfish can remember things for months.
